title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MATIPUNSO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6564 / 53 OG No. 17, 5516 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1765, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MATIPUNSO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Matipunso, barrio of Niing in the Municipality of Tiaong, Province of Quezon, is hereby constituted into a new barrio in the said municipality to be known as the barrio of Matipunso.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
